title: Ghost Town Escape 4 – Mirrored Dimension
description: Within an abandoned military town, youre called to assist spectral residents. Gather 45 mysterious coins to activate an exit portal. Eerie whispers surround you, guiding your mission. Seek out relics linked to the spirits memories. Their appreciation unlocks the portal, merging the realms. Face spectral challenges and enigmas as you journey towards transcendence, where the physical and ethereal converge.
instructions: Mouse PC or tap Mobile to play the game
